positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_conjecture
% SZS output start Proof for pos_conjecture
1. ! [X0] : (romance_language(X0) => indo_european_language(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. romance_language(french) [input(axiom)]
5. indo_european_language(french) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~indo_european_language(french) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~indo_european_language(french) [flattening 6]
8. ! [X0] : (indo_european_language(X0) | ~romance_language(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
9. ~romance_language(X0) | indo_european_language(X0) [cnf transformation 8]
10. romance_language(french) [cnf transformation 2]
18. ~indo_european_language(french) [cnf transformation 7]
19. indo_european_language(french) [resolution 9,10]
21. $false [forward subsumption resolution 19,18]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_conjecture
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_conjecture
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    spanish != basque).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    german != basque).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    french != basque).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    french != spanish).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    spanish != german).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    french != german).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define romance_language(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define indo_european_language(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
